# Translations

You can easily customize the language used in ConnectKit to better suit your audience.

## Example

Choose your preferred language by changing the `language` option within the `<ConnectKitProvider>`:

```jsx
<ConnectKitProvider
  options={{
    language: "ja-JP",
  }}
>
  {/* Your App */}
</ConnectKitProvider>
```

That's it—ConnectKit will now be using your preferred language.

## Here it is in action

The live demo shows the ConnectKit modal rendered in Japanese (`ja-JP`). The button reads **ウォレットの接続** ("Connect Wallet"), and the modal's labels are all translated (e.g. **ウォレットを持っていません** = "I don't have a wallet").

![ConnectKit modal rendered in Japanese](data:image/png;base64,)

**Animation** — clicking the Japanese "ウォレットの接続" button opens the translated modal. Recording included alongside this file:

![ConnectKit translations demo animation](./connectkit-translations-demo.gif)

## Supported Languages

We're always working to support additional languages in ConnectKit. If you'd like us to support an additional language, let us know by raising a discussion on GitHub.

| | Language | Value |
|---|----------|-------|
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="US flag" width="20" /> | English (US) | `en-US` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="AE flag" width="20" /> | العربية | `ar-AE` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="AD flag" width="20" /> | Català | `ca-AD` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="EE flag" width="20" /> | Eesti | `ee-EE` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="ES flag" width="20" /> | Español | `es-ES` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="IR flag" width="20" /> | فارسی | `fa-IR` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="FR flag" width="20" /> | Français | `fr-FR` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="BR flag" width="20" /> | Português | `pt-BR` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="RU flag" width="20" /> | Русский | `ru-RU` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="TR flag" width="20" /> | Türkçe | `tr-TR` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="VN flag" width="20" /> | Tiếng Việt | `vi-VN` |
| <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="CN flag" width="20" /> | 中文 | `zh-CN` |
